body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. cli/internal/bead/merge.go strips dependency edges whose target is absent from the merged set (active union archive) after union; covered by a new merge test that feeds a bead with a dangling dep and asserts the merged output has it removed.","coverage":"Child 'Strip dangling deps during tracker merge' AC1 covers stripping absent-target dependencies after merge union; AC2 covers active-union-archive preservation semantics."},{"parent_ac":"2. cli/internal/bead/import.go strips (not just warns about) dangling deps; test asserts the imported bead has no dangling dep and the reported count is accurate.","coverage":"Child 'Strip dangling deps during bead import' AC1 covers stripping dangling deps from imported beads; AC2 covers accurate warning/report count."},{"parent_ac":"3. detectPrefix never returns a prefix that fails ValidateID (no leading '.', no '/'); test feeds a worktree-style workingDir and asserts the prefix falls back to DefaultPrefix.","coverage":"Child 'Reject invalid worktree-derived bead prefixes' AC1 covers worktree-style fallback to DefaultPrefix; AC2 covers ValidateID-compatible prefix constraints including no leading '.' and no '/'."},{"parent_ac":"4. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead/... green.","coverage":"Child 'Strip dangling deps during tracker merge' AC3; child 'Strip dangling deps during bead import' AC4; child 'Reject invalid worktree-derived bead prefixes' AC3."},{"parent_ac":"5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.","coverage":"Child 'Strip dangling deps during tracker merge' AC4; child 'Strip dangling deps during bead import' AC5; child 'Reject invalid worktree-derived bead prefixes' AC4."}],"child_ids":["ddx-73857d3f","ddx-8166bf68","ddx-7729a9d3"],"rationale":"The parent bead has three independent write-path root causes with separate files, tests, and behavioral risks: merge conflict resolution, import filtering, and prefix derivation. Splitting by write path keeps each child independently executable while preserving the shared non-scope constraints, context, and verification gates."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
